title: 2026 Golden Globe Awards: Best Supporting Actress Winner
text: Based on the Rotten Tomatoes article, Teyana Taylor won the Golden Globe for Best Performance by a Female Actor in Supporting Role in any Motion Picture for her work in One Battle After Another. The article notes that this film was a major winner at the 83rd annual Golden Globes ceremony, with the project also securing awards for Best Motion Picture – Musical or Comedy, Best Director, and Best Screenplay.
